meaning: n.将对手之头紧挟于腋下的一种摔角法
examples: He had him in a headlock.
The guard put a youth in a headlock and dragged him away.
'Cut back to fight, Heavy now has the Scout in a headlock. Cuts back to Scout.'
One of the officers entered the home and encountered Smith holding onto Rebello in a headlock, coming down the stairs, Azzata said.
